MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Christopher J. Martin, Esq. of GIBSON, DUNN, CRUTCHER, LLP for defendant TARRANT PARTNERS, L.P. improperly sued as Texas Pacific Group moving for summary judgment/summary adjudication

Counsel represented in open court that they have settled out of the case and dismissed with prejudice. Based on Mr. Martin's representations, the Court ordered the motion off calendar. Eric Throne, CSR 7855 (JJM)
